hooks.description: Inject deliver operating rules and available capabilities at session start

steps.message: The deliver plugin is active. Operating rules are in AGENTS.md and OPERATING-RULES.md. The deliver skill orchestrates a GAN-style adversarial loop: FRAME → EXPLORE → LOOP(PROPOSE → CRITIC → VERIFY → DECIDE). Available agents: explorer, proposer (planner.agent.md), critic (plan-critic.agent.md), implementer, verifier (tester.agent.md). Available skills: deliver, explore-task, plan-task, critique-plan, implement-task, test-task, build-execution-graph. Key rules: (1) Contract-first — goals, constraints, testable success criteria. (2) Do not trust own output without adversarial critic. (3) External verification — tests, types, builds are ground truth. (4) Stop: accept when verified, escalate when stalled or max iterations. Engineering principles from dev:principles apply — key: Test-Centric, Clear Boundary, Safe Automation.

hooks.description: Remind about loop tracking after file modifications

steps.message: File modified. If executing in the GAN loop: track this change in the implementation record (files_changed). If deviating from the plan, document the deviation. Run project formatters/linters if configured.
Protected path detected. This file is guarded by deliver rules (lock files, secrets, generated files, vendored code). Modification requires explicit plan acknowledgment.
